Title: Test User Creation
Test Data:
- Valid Inputs:
  - Id: 1
  - Password: password123
  - Email: user@example.com
  - Nome: John
  - Cognome: Doe
- Invalid Inputs:
  - Id: 0 (negative)
  - Password: empty string
  - Email: invalid_email@
  - Nome: too_long_name (longer than 50 characters)
  - Cognome: too_long_surname (longer than 50 characters)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter the valid user details.
3. Click the "Register" button.
4. Verify that the user is successfully created and displayed on the user list page.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 with invalid user details to ensure error handling.
Expected Result:
- The system should create a new user with the provided valid details and display it on the user list page.
- The system should not create a user with invalid details and display an error message.

Title: Test User Login
Test Data:
- Valid Inputs:
  - Id: 1
  - Password: password123
- Invalid Inputs:
  - Id: 0 (negative)
  - Password: wrong_password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user login page.
2. Enter the valid user credentials.
3. Click the "Login" button.
4. Verify that the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 with invalid user credentials to ensure error handling.
Expected Result:
- The system should log in the user with the provided valid credentials and redirect them to the dashboard.
- The system should not log in the user with invalid credentials and display an error message.

Title: Test Product Creation
Test Data:
- Valid Inputs:
  - Nome: Product 1
  - Luogo: Location 1
  - Descrizione: Description 1
  - Immagine: image1.jpg
  - Prezzo: 10.00
- Invalid Inputs:
  - Nome: too_long_name (longer than 50 characters)
  - Luogo: too_long_location (longer than 50 characters)
  - Descrizione: too_long_description (longer than 255 characters)
  - Immagine: invalid_image_format
  - Prezzo: negative_price (-1.00)
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the product creation page.
3. Enter the valid product details.
4. Click the "Create Product" button.
5. Verify that the product is successfully created and displayed on the product list page.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with invalid product details to ensure error handling.
Expected Result:
- The system should create a new product with the provided valid details and display it on the product list page.
- The system should not create a product with invalid details and display an error message.

Title: Test Report Creation
Test Data:
- Valid Inputs:
  - Tipo: true (positive)
  - Titolo: Report 1
  - Descrizione: Description of the issue
  - UtenteSegnalato: User 1 (another user)
- Invalid Inputs:
  - Tipo: false (negative)
  - Titolo: too_long_title (longer than 255 characters)
  - Descrizione: too_long_description (longer than 255 characters)
  - UtenteSegnalato: invalid_user (non-existent user)
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the report creation page.
3. Enter the valid report details.
4. Click the "Create Report" button.
5. Verify that the report is successfully created and displayed on the report list page.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with invalid report details to ensure error handling.
Expected Result:
- The system should create a new report with the provided valid details and display it on the report list page.
- The system should not create a report with invalid details and display an error message.
